title: Administration
doc_html:
§1513.  Administration

The Board of Supervisors of Louisiana State University and Agricultural and Mechanical College shall administer the college.

Added by Acts 1964, No. 41, §3.
doc_text:
§1513.  Administration
The Board of Supervisors of Louisiana State University and Agricultural and Mechanical College shall administer the college.
Added by Acts 1964, No. 41, §3.
